description: Link a blockchain wallet to the authenticated user's DID after verifying a signed challenge.

main.description: Verifies the wallet signature against the challenge and creates a wallet link record.

challenge.description: The challenge string that was signed.

signature.description: The wallet's signature over the challenge.

label.description: Optional human-readable label (max 64 chars). Must be unique per user.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing required fields or invalid label.

errors.name: UnsupportedChain
errors.description: The specified chain is not supported.

errors.name: LinkFailed
errors.description: Challenge not found, expired, signature invalid, or wallet already linked.
